ddt:Target.Name: T4_VS_TCM_DDT2000_SW_v_1.7
ddt:Target.Description:
The DDT 2000 file is auto generated by Power tool. (ITELMA, Togliatti separate division)
2014.12.12 - Creation

Data.Name: BOARD_VOLTAGE
Data.Comment: current value of board voltage on ECU terminal

Data.Name: RESERVE_BATTERY_CHARGE
Data.Comment: current value of reserve battery charge

Data.Name: RESERVE_BATTERY_TEMPERATURE
Data.Comment: current value of reserve battery temperature

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: MSD_FORMAT_VERSION
Data.Comment: current format version of minimum set of data

Data.Name: VEHICLE_COORDINATES_RELIABILITY
Data.Comment: current value of vehicle coordinates reliability

Data.Name: VFT.GAS
Data.Comment: fuel type of vehicle (compressed natural gas)

Data.Name: VFT.PROPANE
Data.Comment: fuel type of vehicle (liquid propane gas)

Data.Name: ConfigurationFileReferenceLink
Data.Comment: value of corresponding PDX file name (configuration file reference link)

Data.Name: SystemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: value of module supplier (system supplier identifier)

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: identificator of module hardware and bootloader (vehicle manufacturer ECU hardware number)

Data.Name: SystemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: software number of module (system supplier ECU software number)

Data.Name: SystemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Comment: software version number of module (system supplier ECU software version number)

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: value of order part number reference (vehicle manufacturer spare part number)

Item.Text: signal has too few transitions / events
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
signal has too many transitions / events
circuit short to battery or open
circuit short to ground or open
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding/ General Failure Information
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Request.Name: DataRead.VehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Request.Comment: Read of vehicle manufacturer spare part number

Request.Name: DataRead.VehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Request.Comment: Reading of vehicle manufacturer ECU hardware number

Request.Name: DataRead.SystemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Request.Comment: Read system supplier ECU software number

Request.Name: DataRead.SystemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Request.Comment: Read system supplier ECU software version number

Request.Name: DataRead.SourceOfTimeCalculation
Request.Comment: Reading of source of time calculation

Test.Description: No diagnostic answer from GSM/GPRS module
The inner faults presence in the GSM/GPRS module

Message.Text: Read Vehicle Manufacturer Spare Part Number
Read Vehicle Manufacturer ECU Hardware Number
Read System Supplier ECU Software Number

Category.Name: System Supplier ECU Software Version Number

Label.Text: System Supplier ECU Software Version Number

Message.Text: Read System Supplier ECU Software Version Number
